hero.title: TenBox
taglines: Hatch Cyber Lobsters in One Click
Give Your AI a Safe Shell
An Army of Claws at Your Command
No Ocean Needed, Just a Box
Farm Local, Keep Your Data Home
hero.description: AI Agents run in an isolated computer — they can only see files you explicitly allow, so your privacy and data stay protected. Supports OpenClaw, CoPaw and more. One click to create, as easy as installing an app.

oneclick.title: One-Click Setup
oneclick.desc: Supports OpenClaw, CoPaw and other popular AI Agent projects. Just click and create — no technical skills required.

gui.title: Visual Interface
gui.desc: Fully graphical, what you see is what you get. No command line, no complex config — anyone can get started.

security.title: Privacy & Security
security.desc: Agents run in an isolated sandbox, completely separated from your system. Only the files you explicitly authorize are visible — your private data never leaks.

native.title: Native Performance
native.desc: Leverages built-in virtualization on Windows and macOS — no third-party software needed. Fast and lightweight.

virtio.title: Seamless Experience
virtio.desc: See the screen, hear the audio, share files, copy and paste both ways — feels just like using a local app.

network.title: Instant Connectivity
network.desc: Networking is set up automatically. Your Agent is online the moment it starts — zero manual configuration.

step1.title: Download & Install
step1.desc: Download TenBox and install it like any other app. Works on Windows and macOS.

step2.title: Pick an Agent
step2.desc: Choose the AI Agent you need (OpenClaw / CoPaw and more), then create it with one click.

step3.title: Start Using
step3.desc: It launches automatically — open it up and start working with your Agent right away.
